name: chromatin_accessibility_beam_search
description: Beam-search design of a synthetic DNA target whose predicted chromatin-accessibility signal spells a Morse pattern. Mirrors examples/scripts/epigenomics_morse_proto.py using the full CREB left and right flanks from examples/data, the last 8192 bp of the left flank as the Evo2 prompt, a 21120 bp generated target, and mouse Borzoi/Enformer MORSE scoring. KV caching is disabled, each retained beam gets 8 proposals, and Evo2/scorer batches are capped at 8 so the API/local single-H100 execution path avoids OOM while preserving the biological program setup.
